case_title: HILL, NICHOLAS et al VS REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,553.08 FILED BY HILL, NICHOLAS DAVIDSON, BRIAN AS TO DEFENDANT REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-11-2007 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILL, NICHOLAS DAVIDSON, BRIAN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT REAL MANAGEMENT COMPANY $270.00 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $320.00, THE COURT DETERMINES THAT PLAINTIFFS ARE ENTITLED TO THE RETURN OF $1883.57; DEFENDANT HAVE PREVIOUSLY TENDERED $1613.57 TO PLAINTIFFS. THE JUDGMENT IS THE NET AMOUNT NOW DUE TO PLAINTIFFS, PLUS COSTS OF SUIT. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
